name: chr8_centromere
description: Rat chr8 centromere/pericentromere on mRatBN7.2. Rat centromeres are largely composed of two tandem-repeat families: a 92-bp satellite I (RNSAT1) and a 370-bp satellite II repeat plus minor satellite arrays. mRatBN7.2 places these regions as model assembly with limited per-base resolution. Pericentromeric flanks contain SD pile-ups shared with other pericentromeres.
expected_copy_count: thousands of 92 bp / 370 bp satellite monomers in tandem arrays
